Off Calendar Dec-13-2024 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2024 Set For Trial On Dec-16-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories, For Waiver Of Objections And For Monetary Sanctions (Etop Udo)
Off Calendar Jun-17-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: PLAINTIFF FIRST TECHNOLOGY FEDERAL CREDIT UNION DBA FIRST TECH FEDERAL CREDIT UNION Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories, For Waiver Of Objections And For Monetary Sanctions (Etop Udo)

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):

Laurel A. Adams, Esq., of Fern, Adams & Associates, (925) 927-3401, for Plaintiff.

Etop Udo, in propria persona, Defendant.

Counsel for Plaintiff and Defendant in pro per stipulate to the subject matter begin decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Counsel, Defendant, and the Judge Pro Tem (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to execute the formal stipulation on their behalf.

The matter is argued/contested. Upon conclusion of argument, the court withdraws its original tentative ruling. A modified tentative ruling as discussed during the hearing is adopted. The subject motion is denied without prejudice.

Judge Pro Tem: John-Paul Deol. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
